overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Short IONQ ETF (IONZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of IonQ, Inc. (NYSE: IONQ), less fees and expenses, through derivatives such as swap agreements. IONZ was launched on Jun 23, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
